title: Gharwali Pedwali
subTitle: Mamaji encourages Jeetu's family to visit their ancestral temple. Later, Pappi shares a strategy to rid Jeetu of Latika and Lattu's spirits.

title: Tum Se Tum Tak
subTitle: Anu is shocked when her mother invites Aryavardhan for dinner. Meanwhile, Meera waits angrily for Aryavardhan and Siddhi Mata's wisdom inspires Anu.

title: Vasudha
subTitle: To prevent a Holi scandal, Chandrika calls off Sarika's punishment. On set, Devansh introduces an actress who insults Vasudha and disrespects the Chauhans, sparking Chandrika's fury.

title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
subTitle: After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

title: Tum Se Tum Tak
subTitle: Anu approaches Gopal about his stress after Dr Mohit's suggestion and is left unsettled when he tells her to keep away from Aryavardhan. Meanwhile, Pushpa notices troubling behaviour towards Gayatri.

title: Tum Se Tum Tak
subTitle: Aryavardhan's part in his treatment unsettles Gopal, and he struggles to accept it. Meera's conduct raises Mansi's suspicions, Gayatri speaks to Jhende and Pushpa comes across a disturbing video.
